value.value:
@concat('select (select  ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_projectid,' project_code from [dbo].[PM_ProjectMasterData]  WITH (NOLOCK)) project_number ,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.function_code,'''',' function_code ,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.source_name,'''',' source_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_source_name,'''',' sub_source_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.data_class_budget_name,'''',' data_class_budget_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.data_class_Progress_name,'''',' data_class_Progress_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.data_class_percentage_code,'''',' data_class_percentage_code,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.data_class_quantity_name,'''',' data_class_quantity_name,',
   '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.data_class_time_name,'''',' data_class_time_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_class_budget_hours_name,'''',' sub_class_budget_hours_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_class_budget_quantity_name,'''',' sub_class_budget_quantity_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_class_progress_hours_name,'''',' sub_class_progress_hours_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_class_progress_quantity_name,'''',' sub_class_progress_quantity_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_class_progress_installed_quantity_name,'''',' sub_class_progress_installed_quantity_name,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_class_percentage_code,'''',' sub_class_percentage_code,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.unit_of_measure_Hours,'''',' unit_of_measure_Hours,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.unit_of_measure_Quantity,'''',' unit_of_measure_Quantity,',
    '''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.unit_of_measure_code_percentage,'''',' unit_of_measure_code_percentage,',
    '(select code from SP_Phases WITH (NOLOCK) where ID =   (select PhaseID from SP_WorkArea  WITH (NOLOCK) where Code = vc.Activity_ScheduleWorkArea)) phase_code,
	sr.Code schedule_resource_code
	,vc.Activity_Unit work_unit_code
	,vc.Activity_ScheduleWorkArea work_area_code
	,pa.activity activity_code
	,pa.CWP CWP_Code
	,vc.name IWP_Code
	,vc.StatusCode IWP_Status_Code
	,vc.StatusDescription IWP_StatusDescription
	,pi.PMID
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.Description,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') PMID_Description
	,pi.Contract
	,pi.CostCode Cost_Code
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.CostCodeDescription,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Cost_Code_Description
	,pi.CostingCOA Costing_COA
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.DrawingNo,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Drawing_No
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.TagNo,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Tag_No
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.Spool,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') spool
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.Line,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') line
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.spec,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') spec
	,pi.system
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.PieceMark,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Piece_Mark',
                  ',pi.CostType Cost_Type
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.NumberOfPieces,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Number_Of_Pieces,
	pi.Subsystem,
	replace(replace(replace(pi.text5,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') text5,
	pi.BomNodeID Bom_Node_ID,
	pi.DocID Doc_ID,
	pi.StagingReference Staging_Reference,
	replace(replace(replace(pi.Level6,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Level6,
	piv.plannedStatus planned_Status,
	piv.progressStatus progress_Status,
    case when isnull(vc.CWPEarnedHours,0) = 0
            then ','''','Not Started','''','  when vc.CWPEarnedHours/isnull(vc.CWPBudgetHours,0) > 0 and vc.CWPEarnedHours/isnull(vc.CWPBudgetHours,0) < 1
            then ','''','In Progress','''',' when vc.CWPEarnedHours/isnull(vc.CWPBudgetHours,0) > = 1 then ','''','Completed','''',' end as ','''','workpack_status','''',',
       case when (
              select count(status) from dbo.dm_document  WITH (NOLOCK) where  dm_document.id IN 
              (select DocumentID from dbo.SP_ConstructionWorkPack_Documents spcd  WITH (NOLOCK)   
                where vc.id = spcd.ConstructionWorkPackID and DM_Document.ID=spcd.DocumentID  and dm_document.Status  = 
                     (select status from dbo.SP_IFC_Status  WITH (NOLOCK)  where status = DM_Document.status and ifc=1 and dm_document.ischanged=','''','Y','''',') ))
                     > 0 
              then ','''','Rev Change',''''
 )

@concat(' when     (
              select count(status) from dbo.dm_document  WITH (NOLOCK) where  dm_document.id IN ',
              '(select DocumentID from dbo.SP_ConstructionWorkPack_Documents spcd  WITH (NOLOCK) 
                where vc.id = spcd.ConstructionWorkPackID and DM_Document.ID=spcd.DocumentID  and dm_document.Status  = 
                     (select status from dbo.SP_IFC_Status  WITH (NOLOCK) where status = DM_Document.status and ifc=1 and dm_document.ischanged=','''','N','''',') ))
                     > 0 then ','''','Yes','''',' when (select count(status) from dbo.dm_document  WITH (NOLOCK) where  dm_document.id IN 
              (select DocumentID from dbo.SP_ConstructionWorkPack_Documents spcd  WITH (NOLOCK) 
                where vc.id = spcd.ConstructionWorkPackID and DM_Document.ID=spcd.DocumentID  and dm_document.Status  = 
                     (select status from dbo.SP_IFC_Status  WITH (NOLOCK) where status = DM_Document.status and ifc=0 ) ))
                     > 0 
                     then ','''','No','''',' when (select count(status) from dbo.dm_document  WITH (NOLOCK) where  dm_document.id IN 
              (select DocumentID from dbo.SP_ConstructionWorkPack_Documents spcd  WITH (NOLOCK)  
                where vc.id = spcd.ConstructionWorkPackID and DM_Document.ID=spcd.DocumentID)) = 0 
               then ','''','No Dwg','''',' end  as ','''','IFC','''','	,h.ID 
		ProgressHistoryID
	,pr.code 
		ROCCode
	,prs.Step
	,prs.IsDriving Is_Driving
	,prs.Name
	,h.CaptureOrigin Capture_Origin
	,u.UserName
	,h.Timestamp Progress_Entry_Date_Time
	,s.code
		TimestampShift
	,cast(h.ProgressDate as date)		
		ProgressDate
	,h.ProgressDelta*.01			
		ProgressDelta
	,SUM(h1.progressdelta)*.01 		
		ProgressCumulative
	,0 as Budget_Hrs
	,((((h.progressdelta)* prs.[Percentage])*.01)*(pi.Hours))*.01
		Progressed_Hrs
	,0 as
		Budget_Qty
	,((((h.progressdelta)* prs.[Percentage])*.01)*(pi.Quantity))*.01
		Progressed_Qty
	,case when prs.IsDriving = 1 then (((h.progressdelta)*.01)*(pi.Quantity)) else null end
		Install_Qty,',
'(select max(Timestamp) from ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.SP_ProgressHistory  WITH (NOLOCK)) max_date
from ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.SP_ProgressItem_CWP c WITH (NOLOCK)
inner join ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.SP_ProgressHistory h WITH (NOLOCK)		on c.ID = h.ProgressItemCWPID 
left join  ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.v_ConstructionWorkPack vc WITH (NOLOCK)	on c.CWPID = vc.id 
inner join ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.SP_ScheduleResource sr WITH (NOLOCK)		on vc.ScheduleResourceID = sr.id 
inner join ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.PM_ProgressItem pi WITH (NOLOCK)		on c.ProgressItemID = pi.id 
inner join ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.v_ProgressItem piv WITH (NOLOCK)		on c.ProgressItemID = piv.id 
inner join ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.PM_Activity pa WITH (NOLOCK)			on vc.ActivityID = pa.id 
inner join ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.PM_ROC pr WITH (NOLOCK)				on c.ROCID = pr.id 
left join  ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.pm_rocs prs WITH (NOLOCK)			on c.ROCSID = prs.id 
inner join ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.US_User u WITH (NOLOCK)				on h.UserId = u.ID 
inner join ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.SP_ProgressHistory h1 WITH (NOLOCK)		on h.id >= h1.id and h1.ProgressItemCWPID = c.ID 
inner join ',pipeline().parameters.p_pl_dbname,'.dbo.sp_shift s WITH (NOLOCK)				on s.id = h.shiftid ',' where h.Timestamp >= ','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',' group by
sr.Code, vc.Activity_ScheduleWorkArea, vc.Activity_Unit, pa.SubPrime, vc.name, pi.pmid, prs.[Percentage], h.ID, prs.IsDriving,
pr.code, prs.Step, prs.Name,  h.ProgressDate, h.ProgressDelta, h.CaptureOrigin, u.UserName, s.code, h.Timestamp, pi.hours, pi.Quantity,
pi.Description,pi.Contract,pi.CostCode,pi.CostCodeDescription,pi.CostingCOA,pi.DrawingNo,pi.TagNo,pi.Spool,pi.Line,pi.Spec,pi.System,
pi.PieceMark,pi.CostType,pi.NumberOfPieces,pi.Subsystem,pi.Text5,pi.BomNodeID,pi.DocID,pi.StagingReference,pi.Level6,vc.CWPEarnedHours,vc.CWPBudgetHours,vc.id,
piv.plannedStatus,piv.progressStatus,pa.activity,vc.StatusCode,vc.StatusDescription,pa.CWP
order by h.ProgressDate')

activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: lookup the parameters needed for this pipeline

activities.name: sp_Update_Parameter
activities.description: update the appropriate parameter with revised value. i.e Last run datetime
